scenario: At 03:00 UTC, NovaPay's IR team confirmed a data breach. An attacker gained access via a phishing link clicked by a developer, established a Cobalt Strike beacon, moved laterally to the CI/CD build server, extracted production database credentials, and is actively exfiltrating merchant PII (3,200+ records so far) from the PostgreSQL read replica. The attacker is still on the network. Key tension: the security team wants immediate containment (kill DB connections, rotate all secrets), but VP Engineering warns that $4.2M in Saturday payment transactions will fail if the database goes offline. The CEO wants to control the narrative ahead of the Series D roadshow in 10 days. Legal must decide when the GDPR 72-hour notification clock started.

agent_profiles.name: Yuki Tanaka
agent_profiles.persona: Methodical and calm under pressure. Former SOC analyst with 8 years experience. Prefers structured communication and clear escalation paths. Always documents actions thoroughly.

agent_profiles.name: Raj Patel
agent_profiles.persona: Strategic thinker who balances security with business continuity. Advocates for transparency with the board. Tends to ask probing questions before making decisions.

agent_profiles.name: Marcus Chen
agent_profiles.persona: Results-oriented leader focused on protecting brand reputation and customer trust. Wants concise updates and clear options. Makes fast decisions when given the right information.

agent_profiles.name: Catherine Park
agent_profiles.persona: Meticulous regulatory expert specializing in data privacy law. Cautious but decisive when deadlines loom. Ensures all communications are legally sound before external disclosure.
